title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
description: Awesome list for AI agent harness engineering: tools, patterns, evals, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration.

title: first-fluke/oh-my-agent
description: Portable, vendor-agnostic agent harness for project-specific skills, workflows, and agent teams aligned with your codebase, conventions, and engineering standards.

title: bgdnvk/clanker
description: autonomous systems engineering cli agent for any cloud environment: AWS, GCP, Cloudflare, etc

title: ai-hpc/ai-hardware-engineer-roadmap
description: Master AI inference, AI agent harness systems, and hardware engineering — then design a physical AI chip. That is the goal.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
description: omo/lazycodex: The coding agent for tokenmaxxers;the one and only agent harness for complex codebases. For your Codex, for your OpenCode

title: ruvnet/ruflo
description: 🌊 The leading agent meta-harness for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

title: can1357/oh-my-pi
description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

title: alibaba/open-code-review
description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

title: FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
description: The most comprehensive Claude Code guide: agentic workflows, hooks, skills, MCP servers, quizzes, and production-ready templates. 430K+ lines.

title: langchain-ai/langchain - langchain-openrouter==0.2.4
description:

release(openrouter): 0.2.4 (#38381)

feat(openrouter): surface `parallel_tool_calls` on `bind_tools` (#38214)

chore(model-profiles): refresh model profile data (#38331)

title: langchain-ai/langchain - langchain==1.3.11
description:
Changes since langchain==1.3.10

release(langchain): 1.3.11 (#38377)
fix(langchain,openai): only set `strict=True` on tools for OpenAI-compatible models in `ProviderStrategy` (#38370)

title: langchain-ai/langchain - langchain-openai==1.3.3
description:
Changes since langchain-openai==1.3.2

release(openai): 1.3.3 (#38375)
fix(openai): drop response item ids when `store` is false (#38372)
fix(langchain,openai): only set `strict=True` on tools for OpenAI-compatible models in `ProviderStrategy` (#38370)
test(openai): clarify expected strict schema error (#38338)
fix(openai): drop `stop` from Responses API payload (#38336)
chore: bump langsmith from 0.8.5 to 0.8.18 in /libs/partners/openai (#38293)
chore: bump vcrpy from 8.1.1 to 8.2.1 in /libs/pa

title: 自分の「Claude Code」ツールが、無駄になったトークンの数を83倍も過小評価していたことに気づいた経緯
Claude Codeが「却下したはず」を何度も復活させる——コンテキストエンジニアリングで止める
夜間のlaunchd Claude Codeジョブがpermissionで毎晩ブロックされた — settings.local.jsonが効かない原因は cwd=/、--allowedTools で解決した
CursorのMCP・プラグイン設定が「Customizeページ」で一元管理に
Claude Code の MCP 連携 — 3 つの transport、scope の優先順位、企業向けコントロールまでの全体像
MCPサーバー開発の品質を、LLMへの「拒絶」で担保する
CXの「知識」をコード化する：AIエージェントによるサポート基盤オーケストレーションの実践
